name: TWILIO INC
summary: Twilio Inc. provides a cloud communications platform that enables businesses to embed messaging, voice, email, and video interactions into customer-facing applications via APIs. Its platform combines communications APIs (Programmable Messaging, Programmable Voice, SendGrid Email), software products (digital engagement centers, marketing campaigns, user authentication), customer data capabilities, and AI-powered orchestration. As of December 31, 2025, Twilio served over 402,000 Active Customer Accounts ranging from SMBs to large enterprises across numerous industries.

products.name: Twilio Programmable Messaging
products.description: API to send and receive SMS, MMS, RCS, and OTT messages globally across various sender types.

products.name: Twilio Programmable Voice
products.description: API enabling developers to build solutions to make, manage, and receive phone calls globally via browser, app, or phone.

products.name: Twilio SendGrid Email
products.description: API and no-code UI for email delivery at scale, built on a proprietary mail transfer agent with inbox optimization.

products.name: Marketing Campaigns
products.description: No-code email campaign product built on SendGrid infrastructure with design tools, list management, and dynamic content.

products.name: User Authentication and Identity
products.description: Solutions enabling businesses to verify and authenticate users with advanced compliance and regulatory management support.

products.name: Twilio Super Network
products.description: Software layer interconnecting global communications networks and inbox providers, optimizing quality and cost of communications.

partnerships.description: Twilio Programmable Messaging supports WhatsApp as an over-the-top messaging channel for customers.
Twilio Programmable Messaging supports Facebook Messenger as an over-the-top messaging channel for customers.
